      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static Faker Faker.instance()
      Constructs Faker instance with default argument.
      static Faker Faker.instance(java.util.Locale locale)
      Constructs Faker instance with provided Locale.
      static Faker Faker.instance(java.util.Locale locale, java.util.Random random)
      Constructs Faker instance with provided Locale and Random.
      static Faker Faker.instance(java.util.Random random)
      Constructs Faker instance with provided Random.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Get A valid MEX CURP.

      Generate a valid social security number on faker

    • Uses of Faker in net.datafaker.passportnumbers

      Methods in net.datafaker.passportnumbers with parameters of type Faker 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String AmPassportNumber.getInvalidAm(Faker faker)
      Generates an invalid American passport number
      java.lang.String ChPassportNumber.getInvalidCh(Faker faker)
      Generates an invalid Chinese passport number
      java.lang.String AmPassportNumber.getValidAm(Faker faker)
      Generates a valid American passport number
      java.lang.String ChPassportNumber.getValidCh(Faker faker)
      Generates a valid Chinese passport number

    • Uses of Faker in net.datafaker.service

      Methods in net.datafaker.service with parameters of type Faker 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String FakeValuesService.expression(java.lang.String expression, Faker faker)
      Resolves an expression using the current faker.
      java.lang.String FakeValuesService.fileExpression(java.nio.file.Path path, Faker faker)
      Resolves an expression in file using the current faker.
      java.lang.String FakeValuesService.resolve(java.lang.String key, java.lang.Object current, Faker root)
      Resolves a key to a method on an object or throws an exception.
      java.lang.String FakeValuesService.resolve(java.lang.String key, java.lang.Object current, Faker root, java.util.function.Supplier<java.lang.String> exceptionMessage)
      Resolves a key to a method on an object or throws an exception with specified message.
      protected java.lang.String FakeValuesService.resolveExpression(java.lang.String expression, java.lang.Object current, Faker root)
      processes a expression in the style #{X.y} using the current objects as the 'current' location within the yml file (or the Faker object hierarchy as it were).
